title: crotalaria tristis
intro: Crotalaria tristis, also known as the 'Sad Bush' or 'Weeping Calotrope', is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria tristis is often used in infusions or decoctions, and its dried leaves and flowers can be consumed as teas or added to capsules for medicinal purposes.
